message:
feat(pager): expose is_single_connection_cache_fast_path_enabled() accessor

Adds a #[must_use] accessor on SimplePager so callers (and tests) can
check whether the single-connection cache fast path was successfully
enabled without reaching through `self.cache.is_fast_path_enabled()`.

Companion to the connection.rs change in the previous commit
(639f0981) that calls `enable_single_connection_cache_fast_path()`
on schema-only opens — those new tests now have a public accessor
to assert against.

Pure additive; no semantics change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
